violations.text: The downstairs bar is lacking a handwashing sink. A handwashing sink must be accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. Establishment to send photo of hands sink installed to RIDOH. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2024

Shellfish was observed in the kitchen without tags, shellfish was left out on the counter and was out of temperature. Through interview with PIC it was determined that the shellfish belonged to members and came from an unapproved source. Shellfish were voluntarily disposed of. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2024

The door to the outside, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2024
